text.content: Yannick requested recreation of the Loveable website using Replit. Manus built a complete full-stack CasaTAO guesthouse management application with French content, featuring public pages, guest portal, admin dashboard, and role-based authentication. The application includes 4 database tables, email/password auth, and comprehensive testing with 23 passing vitest tests.

markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

Yannick requested recreation of the Loveable website using Replit. Manus built a complete full-stack CasaTAO guesthouse management application with French content, featuring public pages, guest portal, admin dashboard, and role-based authentication. The application includes 4 database tables, email/password auth, and comprehensive testing with 23 passing vitest tests.


## Context & Intent

User wanted to recreate a website called Loveable on Replit platform, providing migration documentation for a guesthouse booking system


## What Was Done

Built complete full-stack Next.js application with PostgreSQL database, implemented authentication system with RBAC, created public pages, guest portal, admin dashboard, and comprehensive test suite


## Outputs Produced

- [web_application] CasaTAO Guesthouse App — Complete full-stack booking management system with French UI
- [database_schema] PostgreSQL Schema — 4-table database structure for users, stays, requests, and journal entries
- [test_suite] Vitest Tests — 23 passing tests validating authentication and RBAC flows

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Used Next.js with TypeScript for robust full-stack development
- Implemented PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM for data persistence
- Created role-based access control with guest and admin roles
- Applied warm earthy color palette for guesthouse aesthetic

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Comprehensive test-driven development approach
- Clear separation of public/guest/admin areas
- French localization implementation
Failed / suboptimal:

- Initial server errors during development
- Required server restart to clear persistent issues
Discoveries:

- Successful full-stack application deployment on Replit
- Effective role-based authentication implementation

## Challenges & Blockers

- Server persistence errors during development
- Database initialization timing issues

## Open Questions

- How to create initial admin account
- Integration with actual email notification system

## Next Steps

- Create admin account via database script
- Replace placeholder images with actual guesthouse photos
- Implement email notification system for new bookings
